                          - [126] Group [actions=[invoke]]
                            - [127] Edit [value="Agent Desktop UI — Colors + Live App View
Goals
1. Richer visual design — skill-colored accents, preset-specific themes, clearer status hierarchy (beyond current GitHub-dark minimal palette).
2. Live desktop feedback on Run — while a session is running, show:
• Target app (from planner/computer metadata: Calculator, browser, Cursor)
• Latest frame (screenshot the agent sees: turn-*/click.png, turn-*/screenshot.png, or artifacts/vision_turn_*.png)
• Open windows (from cua-driver list_windows, with target window highlighted)
loop [every 1.5s while running]
POST /api/run
GET /api/sessions/{id}
nodes, target_app, computer.path
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live
find newest frame PNG
list_windows
frame_url, windows, target_pid
GET /api/sessions/{id}/frame
image/png
index.html
ui_server.py
trajectory_dir
cua-driver

Backend changes — code/ui_server.py
Extend session payload
In _node_summary / _session_payload, add fields the UI can render without parsing raw graph JSON:
Field
Source
target_app
metadata.app on running/pending computer node, or output.app when complete
target_goal
metadata.goal on computer node
computer.path
already exposed; add turns
New helpers
• _latest_trajectory_dir(sid) — scan state/sessions/{sid}/computer/trajectory_* for newest dir
• _latest_frame_path(trajectory_dir) — newest PNG by mtime among:
◦ turn-*/click.png, turn-*/screenshot.png
◦ artifacts/vision_turn_*.png
• _list_desktop_windows() — thin wrapper around CuaDriverClient().list_windows() (reuse PATH fallback from _probe_cua_driver)
New endpoints
Endpoint
Purpose
GET /api/sessions/{sid}/live
{target_app, target_goal, path, frame_available, frame_turn, windows: [{title, app_name, pid, window_id, is_target}]}
GET /api/sessions/{sid}/frame
Serve latest frame PNG (FileResponse); 404 if none yet
GET /api/desktop/windows
Standalone window list (optional refresh button in UI)
Safety: _safe_session_trajectory(sid, path) ensures resolved paths stay under state/sessions/{sid}/computer/ before serving files.
Tests — code/tests/test_ui_server.py
• _latest_frame_path picks newest PNG from fixture directory tree
• /api/sessions/{sid}/live returns target_app when graph has computer metadata
• /api/sessions/{sid}/frame returns 404 when no trajectory exists
Frontend changes — code/static/index.html
Color / layout upgrade (CSS only)
Expand :root tokens and add skill/preset accents:
--skill-planner: #a371f7;
--skill-computer: #39d4d4;
--skill-formatter: #3fb950;
--layer-hotkey: #f0883e;
--layer-electron: #58a6ff;
--layer-vision: #f778ba;
• Header — subtle gradient background; vision health pill (already in API, not shown in UI yet)
• Preset cards — left border color by layer (calc_hotkey → orange, canvas_vision → pink, cursor_electron → blue) via data-layer from code/ui/presets.yaml
• Progress table — skill column gets colored dot/badge; running row pulse animation
• Status pills — gateway / cua-driver / vision with distinct colors
New "Desktop view" panel (between Progress and Answer)
┌─ Desktop view ─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Target: [browser]  Path: vision  Turn: 2           │
│ ┌─────────────────┐  ┌ Open windows ─────────────┐ │
│ │  live screenshot │  │ ● canvas_only - Comet     │ │
│ │  (img #live-frame)│  │   Agent Desktop UI      │ │
│ └─────────────────┘  └───────────────────────────┘ │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
• Panel visible when status === "running" or when computer data exists
• pollSession() also calls /api/sessions/{sid}/live and sets #live-frame.src = .../frame?t={mtime} to bust cache
• Window list: highlight row where is_target or title matches target_app
• Show placeholder ("Waiting for computer skill…" / "No frame yet") before first screenshot
Presets YAML — code/ui/presets.yaml
Add optional layer field per preset for card styling:
- id: calc_hotkey
  layer: hotkey
- id: canvas_vision
  layer: vision
- id: cursor_electron
  layer: electron
Expose via existing GET /api/presets (no API shape break).
What you will see after implementation
When
UI behavior
Click Run
Progress table + Desktop view panel opens
Planner completes
Target app chip appears (browser, Calculator, etc.)
Computer skill running
Screenshot updates each poll; window list shows Comet/Cursor/Calculator with target highlighted
Complete
Final frame + path/result remain visible; polling stops
Out of scope (kept simple)
• True video stream / WebRTC of desktop
• Clicking windows in the UI to change target
• Separate CSS file or build step (stay single-file index.html per current pattern)
Verification
1. Restart UI: cd code; .\run_ui.ps1
2. Run Canvas preset — Desktop view should show canvas_only window highlighted and updating screenshot
3. Run Calculator preset — target Calculator, hotkey path, no vision frame until calc window captured
4. pytest tests/test_ui_server.py -q
